repository.name: malphas
repository.description: High-performance, bare-metal graphics engine. Rust core with strict C-ABI FFI and a 120Hz Flutter visual chassis. Features dynamic package loading, Ed25519 cryptographic signing, and native multi-architecture deployment (Desktop & Android).
